description: False-colour infrared (FCIR) satellite or aerial imagery displaying a mixed rural and peri-urban landscape. The imagery uses reddish tones for vegetation (darker red for denser vegetation, lighter red/pink for sparser areas) and grey/blue tones for non-vegetated or artificial surfaces. A large, irregular area is prominently delineated by a bright green polygon boundary. Within this delineated area, a single bright green circular point marker is visible towards the upper right. The landscape within and around the outlined area features distinct rectangular agricultural fields, patches of natural or semi-natural vegetation, and some greyish areas that may represent artificial surfaces or bare ground. No scale, compass, legend, or specific geographic location (country, region) is visible.
